title: fordia albiflora
intro: Fordia albiflora, also known as the White-Flowered Fordia or White-Flowered Pigeonwings, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fordia albiflora include its potential to aid in the management of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Fordia albiflora is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a herbal supplement.
